The '''d'oemir bears''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Bear/Legends|bear]] that were native to the [[Jhunia Snow Plains|Jhunia snow plains]] of the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Neftali/Legends|Neftali]]. They topped the [[Foodstuff/Legends|food]] chain prior to the planet's colonization. Both their meat and fur caused them to be hunted to near-extinction, resulting in their hunting being regulated by license.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1997-06-XX -->''[[The Black Sands of Socorro]]''
